pre-pump-radar.headline_preview: AI semiconductor dominance (MU) paired with cybersecurity acceleration (PANW, CRWD) in reflation regime; CDNS software breakout offers asymmetric 5x upside on conviction breadth expansion.

signal-board.headline_preview: Neutral terrain with equity headwinds: valuation concerns and housing weakness offset modest smart-money accumulation and RV support.

risk-desk.headline_preview: Calm regime with modest liquidity headwind: master crisis score 33.4 (DEFCON 4), firm posture GREEN, single-name concentration binding constraint at 27.3% of gross.

liquidity.headline_preview: Abundant liquidity regime: Strong dollar (119.29 index) strains offshore funding despite benign domestic stress indicators

fundamentals.headline_preview: AI and semiconductor themes dominate momentum with CHAT/AIQ leading, but fundamental data is insufficient for deep valuation analysis—MU appears positioned in hot ETF flows yet requires comprehensive DCF/quality metrics.
